description_long: This is a stylized doll figure standing on a circular display base, dressed in a deep red, kimono-inspired robe with wide sleeves and a short skirt. The doll has long, straight black hair tied into a high ponytail that cascades down her back, and her face is painted with a dramatic red mask covering the eyes and upper cheeks. She wears matching red boots and gloves, and her pose is elegant, with one arm bent and the other resting at her side. The base is decorated with a snowy or frosted effect, and a translucent, swirling ribbon-like element encircles the figure, adding a sense of motion and mystique. Small white particles float around the doll, enhancing the magical or ethereal appearance.
description: A stylized doll in a red kimono-style outfit with a dramatic mask, long black ponytail, and standing on a snowy display base with swirling translucent accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's masked face, red robe, and both arms visible, with the swirling ribbon element prominent.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long ponytail, the profile of the face, and the layered robe with visible boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the ponytail, the back of the robe, and the swirling ribbon wrapping behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the doll's profile, the arm bent at the elbow, and the flowing ponytail with the ribbon element curving forward.
attribute_clothing_style: A short, deep red kimono-style robe with wide sleeves, tied at the waist, paired with matching red boots and gloves, evoking traditional Japanese fashion with a modern, stylized twist.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with one arm bent at the elbow and the other relaxed at the side, head facing forward, legs together, and torso straight, conveying a poised and elegant stance.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with a dramatic red mask covering the eyes and upper cheeks, eyes wide open and mouth closed, giving an enigmatic and intense look.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight black hair styled in a high ponytail that extends down the back, smooth and sleek in texture.
